Speaker: Man
Text: I don't know, she's, uhhh... I think she's... her house.

Speaker: SPEAKER_01
Text: Her house? I think.

Speaker: LPC
Text: [accented] Huh. Can I reach her there, please?

Speaker: Man
Text: Huh?

Speaker: LPC
Text: May I read her there?

Speaker: Man
Text: I don't... she will come tomorrow morning, you can call... tomorrow morning.

Speaker: LPC
Text: What is her own phone number?

Speaker: Man
Text: I don't have.

Speaker: LPC
Text: Could you get phone me, please?

Speaker: Man
Text: Uh, you call me before too, you remember.

Speaker: Man
Text: No, I did not.

Speaker: Man
Text: I can't give her phone number.

Speaker: Man
Text: Why not?

Speaker: Man
Text: I am so sorry, sir.

Text: [accented] You will give me the number.

Speaker: Man
Text: I can't, I can't.

Speaker: LPC
Text: [accented] You will give me the number at once, sir.

Speaker: Man
Text: I, I can't, sir. I'm so sorry.

Text: Okay.

Text: Thank you.
